title: agent.session v1
description: Coding agent session lifecycle events from all sources. Two producers write to nbus:agent.session. (1) The OSC-133 / claude-host adapter (adapters/osc133/) emits rich session events keyed by agent_id/conversation_id — events: started, turn_end, notification, compact. (2) The pane-monitor adapter (zjstatus / nervous-board) emits sparse pane-state events keyed by pane_id — events: stopped, updated. Note: CloudEvent type field is 'agent.session' (no .v1 suffix), so redis-mirror passes these through without schema validation. Consumers should branch on presence of 'agent_id' to distinguish the two producer shapes.

event.description: Lifecycle event. OSC-133 producer: started, turn_end, notification, compact, ended. Pane-monitor producer: stopped, updated. model_changed and context_loaded are aspirational (not yet emitted).

agent_id.description: UUID of the Claude Code session. Present on OSC-133 events only (started, turn_end, notification, compact, ended).

agent_kind.description: Host-side agent runtime kind. Present on OSC-133 events only.

conversation_id.description: UUID of the top-level conversation context. For host sessions equals agent_id.

session_id.description: UUID of the session context. For OSC-133 events equals agent_id.

cwd.description: Absolute path of the working directory when the event fired. For worktree agents points into .claude/worktrees/<id>/.

display.description: Zellij pane display label (e.g. 'nervous-bus', 'home-automation [agent-session-mods]'). Present on OSC-133 events.

project.description: Project name — basename of the project directory (e.g. 'nervous-bus', 'tengine'). Present on most events.

transcript_path.description: Absolute path to the Claude Code .jsonl transcript file for this session.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp from the originating adapter. Complement to the CloudEvent 'time' field.

source_kind.description: How this session was initiated. Observed values: 'resume' (session restored from transcript).

worktree.description: Name or relative path of the git worktree the agent is operating in (e.g. 'agent-session-mods', 'agent-session-mods/apps/android'). Absent when not in a worktree.

message.description: Human-readable notification message. Present on event='notification' only (e.g. 'Claude is waiting for your input').

pane_id.description: Zellij pane identifier (e.g. 'zellij:cc-mobile:1'). Present on pane-monitor events (stopped, updated).

model.description: Model identifier (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6'). Present on pane-monitor 'updated' events.

git_branch.description: Active git branch when the event fired. Present on pane-monitor 'updated' events.

session_type.description: Session mode. Observed value: 'master_interactive'. Present on pane-monitor 'updated' events.

started_at.description: When this agent session started. Present on pane-monitor 'updated' events.

tokens_in.description: Cumulative input tokens consumed by this session. Present on pane-monitor 'updated' events.

tokens_out.description: Cumulative output tokens produced by this session. Present on pane-monitor 'updated' events.

bead_id.description: Bead being worked on in this session, if any. Present on pane-monitor 'updated' events; empty string when none.
